prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: ending illustration. Story world: Red Creek Winter. Premise: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi.. Setting: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown. Threat presence: The White Knife. Recurring motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass. Ending card for "Corruption Pact" (CORRUPTION). Summary: You accept staged closure to keep panic and tourism revenue controlled.. Deliver emotional closure with sequel-hook tension.. Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery. Tone: INTENSE. Immediate scene brief: Red Creek Winter - Corruption Pact Ending Card. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
